title: Enphase Energy (ENPH) Analyst Ratings and Price Targets
text: Enphase Energy has a consensus rating of Hold with a consensus price target of $43.12 from 29 analysts. The price target range spans from a highest target of $101.00 from Craig-Hallum issued February 5, 2025, to a lowest target of $23.49 from GLJ Research issued September 23, 2025. Recent analyst activity shows the three most recent ratings from Barclays, Evercore ISI Group, and Citigroup in May 2026, averaging a price target of $32.67. Barclays issued an Underweight rating with a $30 target on May 5, 2026. Evercore ISI Group maintained an In-Line rating with a $37 target on May 4, 2026. Citigroup issued a Neutral rating with a $31 target on April 30, 2026. Notable rating change: Jefferies upgraded the stock on February 25, 2026, raising their target to $57 with a Hold to Buy upgrade, representing 8.45% upside potential at that time.
